calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-24-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Doucette.
Petitioner: John Jacinto Ramos, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Jhoney Hyacinth Ramos-Ballejo.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-05-2007 Reset To Apr-24-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Petitioner: John Jacinto, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Matter is continued to April 24, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218.
Petitioner to file an Amended Petition with proper informations as to the Attachment to the Petition.
The Court waived re-publication process of the Amended OSC.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the minor were made at the hearing.
